goal: Replace 649-URL full inspection with smart weekly Pages report + daily API checks

checks.name: GSC Search Analytics API Pull
checks.purpose: Track impressions, clicks, CTR, position trends
checks.alert_if: Clicks drop to 0 for 7+ days OR avg position drops >5 spots

checks.name: First-Click Watchlist
checks.method: Check gsc-api-truth-current.json for pages with impressions >10 and clicks = 0
checks.purpose: Identify pages close to getting first click — highest ROI for title/description improvements
checks.alert_if: New pages enter watchlist with >50 impressions

checks.name: Changed Pages Check
checks.method: Compare today's API data with yesterday's — flag pages with large impression/position changes
checks.alert_if: >20% position change on Tier 1 calculator pages

checks.name: GSC Pages Report Issue Groups
checks.method: CloakBrowser → GSC → Indexing → Pages (if session alive) OR URL Inspection API sampling
actions: Flag new issues or growing groups
checks.alert_if: Indexed count drops >5% OR new issue group appears

checks.name: Smart URL Inspection Sampling
checks.method: URL Inspection API: 10 URLs from each issue group (max 50 total)
checks.purpose: Verify issue groups still accurate, detect changes

checks.name: Validate Fix Decision Review
checks.method: Check if any content improvements were deployed in past week
checks.purpose: Determine if any issue groups now qualify for Validate Fix
checks.rule: Only validate AFTER content improvements live for 7+ days

what_not_to_do: Do NOT inspect all 649 URLs weekly — 50 smart samples is sufficient
Do NOT click Validate Fix without 7+ days of live content improvements
Do NOT use Google Indexing API for bulk indexing
Do NOT scrape GSC Performance dashboard — use API + correction factor
Do NOT re-enable old risky automations
Do NOT send HARO/outreach based solely on indexing status
cron_recommendation: Create: (a) daily API pull at 10 AM EEST, (b) weekly Pages report check Monday 10 AM EEST
